name: Torchiere Floor Lamp - Room Essentials™
description:
Provide ambient lighting to any room in your home with this Torchiere Floor Lamp from Room Essentials™. This tall torchiere floor lamp brings a touch of sleek, minimalist style to your space. It features an upward-facing white bowl shade that's attached to a slim metal stand with a pedestal base. The turn knob rotary switch with on/off light setting offers easy function.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
